# Description

<!--
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update
- [ ] Small minor change not affecting the Ansible role code (GitHub Actions workflow, documentation, etc.)

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!--
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
-->

- [ ] `ansible-lint` passes with 0 failures and 0 warnings
- [ ] `python3 -m yamllint .` passes with 0 issues
- [ ] `molecule test -s default` passes (offline/render scenario)
- [ ] New variables added to `defaults/main.yml` and `meta/argument_specs.yml`
